statement: In every magma, Equation 1732 (`x = (y * y) * ((y * y) * y)`) implies Equation 3729 (`x * y = (x * y) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0081
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op y y) y))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op x y) (op z z))
